General.Name: Sabra Healthcare REIT Inc
General.Description: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. operates as a self-administered, self-managed real estate investment trust that, through its subsidiaries, owns and invests in real estate serving the healthcare industry throughout the United States and Canada. Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. is incorporated on May 10th, 2010 in Maryland.
